Motion For Order To Stay Action Pending Mediation; Proposed Order; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Declaration Of Mark J. Rice
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Mark Rice, Esq. representing Plaintiff Fredric Vinna.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. representing Defendant Modern Art Construction
Patricia Medina, Esq. representing Defendants Yibo Ling and Xuezhao

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FREDRIC VINNA Motion For Order To Stay Action Pending Mediation; Proposed Order

is stayed until September 1, 2026. Per the declaration of Mark Rice all parties agreed to mediate and mediation is set for August 24, 2026.

Moving party to prepare proposed order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Mark Rice, Esq. representing Plaintiff Fredric Vinna.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. representing Defendant Modern Art Construction
Patricia Medina, Esq. representing Defendants Yibo Ling and Xuezhao

Mr. Vaillancourt for the Defendant Modern Art Construction request for a ruling on the demurrer prior to mediation.

Discussion made by parties.
Parties stipulate to next hearing date.

All parties waive notice.
